ind1.formula: metrics['m_q0101'] + metrics['m_q0103'] + metrics['m_q0104'] + metrics['m_q0105'] + metrics['m_q0106'] + metrics['m_q0107']
ind1.title: Total number of people in the organization segregated by sex
ind1.description: Sums up all distinct human components active within the entity's direct social perimeter.

ind2.formula: metrics['m_q0101'] + metrics['m_q0103'] + metrics['m_q0104'] + metrics['m_q0105'] + metrics['m_q0106'] + metrics['m_q0107']
ind2.title: Total number of member persons in the organization
ind2.description: Calculates the total underlying corporate, operational, and structural base headcount[cite: 1].

ind3.title: % of people in the organization segregated by sex
ind3.description: Proportional percentage check mapping gender distribution metrics across the social base[cite: 1].

ind118.title: Total number of working people in the organization
ind118.description: Aggregates working cooperative members and regular salaried staff on payroll[cite: 1].

ind264.title: Number of workplaces of the organization
ind264.description: Absolute count of separate operating facilities, offices, plants, or workshops[cite: 1].

ind4.title: Equivalent average workforce template (FTE slots)
ind4.description: The normalized job volume expressed in full-time equivalent annual days worked[cite: 1].

ind5.title: Volume of purchases over operational expenses
ind5.description: Ratio evaluating the weight of external procurement against global yearly outlays[cite: 1].

ind6.title: Commercial business turnover rate
ind6.description: Proportion of total income derived from standard sales of goods and services[cite: 1].

ind7.title: % of dependency on public subsidies
ind7.description: Measures corporate reliance on public grants relative to total input streams[cite: 1].

ind8.title: Difference between income and expenses
ind8.description: Raw operational economic indicator tracking baseline financial margin[cite: 1].

ind9.title: Annual economic net result
ind9.description: The definitive bottom-line net financial accounting balance for the period[cite: 1].

ind168.title: Total gross salary and remuneration packages outlay
ind168.description: Combines direct annual gross salaries with absorbed internal leave compensations[cite: 1].

ind114.title: Average salary of the exercise segregated by sex
ind114.description: Normalized yearly average pay allocated per single active FTE slot[cite: 1].

ind256.title: % of economic surpluses distributed to member entities or persons
ind256.description: Surplus fraction paid out as direct dividends compared to total distribution baseline[cite: 1].

ind257.title: % of distributed economic surpluses dedicated to loss compensation
ind257.description: Surplus fraction channeled backward to patch financial adjustments or losses[cite: 1].

ind258.formula: metrics['m_q1413'] > 0 ? ((metrics['m_q1407'] + metrics['m_q1408'] + metrics['m_q1409'] + metrics['m_q1410'] + metrics['m_q1411']) / metrics['m_q1413']) * 100 : 0
ind258.title: % of economic surpluses dedicated to structural reserves
ind258.description: Combined profit quota reinvested into multi-purpose internal reserve funds[cite: 1].

ind275.title: Economic surpluses dedicated completely to Reserves
